pages.text: $(o)"Eight seconds. The world gives us eight seconds — what you do with them is yours."$()$(br2)— Third Steward of the Observatory, last words before the Watcher fell.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)32 blocks$(), all non-player entities receive:$(br)· Slowness V$(br)· Weakness V$(br)· Mining Fatigue V$(br2)Duration: $(l)8 seconds$() (Bosses: $(l)2 seconds$()).$(br2)Cost: $(l)3600$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Not actual time-stop — but the triple debuff is functionally equivalent. Open with this, then unload.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 3 Convergence$() or above.
